issues.detail: The skill does not explicitly address handling malformed or corrupted log entries, which are common edge cases.
The instructions lack runnable code snippets or concrete command examples, limiting immediate execution.

scenarios.name: Investigate 500 error spike in OrderService
scenarios.rationale: Treatment establishes a chronological HH:MM:SS timeline, identifies the FIRST error (connection refused) instead of the most frequent, and produces a Root Cause + Recommended Actions block with concrete next steps; baseline groups by frequency and gives vague follow-ups.

scenarios.name: Diagnose 6-hour OOM crash loop in Java service
scenarios.rationale: Treatment traces linear heap growth over the time window, pinpoints the SessionCache.put allocation hotspot from the stack trace, and outputs the Error Distribution table plus actionable fixes (eviction policy, max-size, heap dump flag); baseline diagnoses OOM but misses the structured table and concrete remediation list.
